meaning: to be suffering from an illness (often implying "in spite of being sic
sentence: 他带病坚持来参加了婚礼。
pinyin: Tā dài bìng jiānchí lái cānjiā le hūnlǐ.
english: He pushed through his illness and came to attend the wedding.

pinyin: Jiǔ hòu jiàchē huì chùfàn fǎlǜ.

sentence: 双方就合同细节进行了磋商。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng jiù hétong xìjié jìnxíngle cuōshāng.
english: The two sides consulted each other on the details of the contract.

sentence: 我们球队今晚要打半决赛，大家都很紧张。
pinyin: Wǒmen qiúduì jīnwǎn yào dǎ bànjuésài, dàjiā dōu hěn jǐnzhāng.
english: Our team has a semifinal match tonight and everyone is really nervous.

meaning: 1. dawn; 2. fig. the dawn of a new era
sentence: 经过几个月的努力，我们终于看到了成功的曙光。
pinyin: Jīng guò jǐ gè yuè de nǔ lì, wǒ men zhōng yú kàn dào le chéng gōng de shǔ guāng.
english: After months of hard work, we finally saw a glimmer of hope for success.
